message:
feat(engine): add five new algorithmic modules for decision theory and optimization

Add entropy_evidence_compressor (Shannon-optimal evidence compression),
optimal_stopping (CUSUM/Gittins/Snell for containment escalation),
tropical_semiring (min-plus algebra for IR3 scheduling),
regret_bounded_router (EXP3/FTRL online lane routing), and
spectral_fleet_convergence (Fiedler-based gossip mixing bounds).
Register all five as public modules in lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
